page_subtitle: End-to-end presentation: Raw Yelp JSON -> HDFS -> Hive -> PySpark -> Zeppelin -> Query by SilkByteX

opening.title: Where Distributed Computing Meets Conversational Analytics
opening.line_1: From raw Yelp JSON to decision-ready conversation through one integrated system.
opening.line_2: We built a full pipeline: storage, warehousing, processing, visualization, and AI-powered query interaction.
opening.connect: Connection: Behind every simple answer is a scalable data pipeline.

hero_slots.label: Agenda Storyboard
hero_slots.caption: Complete presentation sequence mapped to engineering and product milestones

hero_slots.label: Journey Reveal Animation
hero_slots.caption: Animated transition from data ingestion to conversational intelligence

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.line_1: Built as a complete workflow, not isolated scripts or disconnected notebooks.
chapters.line_2: Each layer has a clear role: ingest, structure, analyze, visualize, and converse.
chapters.connect: Connection: Structured systems make intelligent experiences possible.

slot_1.label: Agenda Map
slot_1.caption: Presentation roadmap tied to project execution

slot_2.label: Project Storyboard
slot_2.caption: From complexity to clarity across one connected system

chapters.title: Problem Statement & Why This Matters
chapters.line_1: Large-scale raw data is hard to convert into immediate business decisions.
chapters.line_2: A conversational layer makes advanced analysis accessible to broader users.
chapters.connect: Connection: The goal is not only computation, but comprehension.

slot_1.label: Problem-to-Value Bridge
slot_1.caption: The gap between raw signals and usable decisions

slot_2.label: System Context
slot_2.caption: How architecture reduces analysis friction

chapters.title: About Yelp & Why We Chose This Dataset
chapters.line_1: Yelp combines merchant profiles, reviews, ratings, photos, and social credibility signals.
chapters.line_2: Its public dataset provides real scale: 6,685,900 reviews, 192,609 businesses, and 200,000 pictures.
chapters.connect: Connection: Real platform behavior makes system validation credible.

slot_1.label: Yelp Dataset Scale
slot_1.caption: Dataset size and business relevance at a glance

slot_2.label: Context Visual
slot_2.caption: Practical environment for large-scale analytical learning

chapters.title: Dataset Structure
chapters.line_1: Four core entities anchor the system: user, business, review, and checkin.
chapters.line_2: Their relationships power lifecycle analysis, sentiment mining, and traffic behavior.
chapters.connect: Connection: Schema is context, and context drives correctness.

slot_1.label: Entity Relationship Story
slot_1.caption: Core entities linked for ETL, SQL logic, and product interaction

slot_2.label: Entity Map
slot_2.caption: Schema-level backbone for analytical correctness

chapters.title: Overall System Journey
chapters.line_1: Raw Yelp JSON flows through distributed storage, structured warehousing, scalable processing, and visual analysis.
chapters.line_2: Query by SilkByteX sits on top as the conversational layer for explainable access.
chapters.connect: Connection: A pipeline where one stage feeds the next.

slot_1.label: System Backbone
slot_1.caption: Official project journey from source files to product interaction

slot_2.label: Journey Animation
slot_2.caption: Progressive reveal of the full stack lifecycle

chapters.title: Part 1: Big Data ETL Pipeline
chapters.line_1: HDFS enables reliable distributed ingestion at scale.
chapters.line_2: Hive and Spark transform raw files into structured, queryable, and analyzable datasets.
chapters.connect: Connection: From raw files to structured, queryable data.

slot_1.label: ETL Stages Ribbon
slot_1.caption: Four required engineering stages in one view

slot_2.label: Technical Blueprint
slot_2.caption: Architecture alignment with ETL responsibilities

chapters.title: Data Cleaning & Transformation
chapters.line_1: Cleaning and transformation stabilize data quality before metric interpretation.
chapters.line_2: Type normalization, join logic, and aggregation pipelines enforce analytical consistency.
chapters.connect: Connection: Clean data is the precondition for trusted analytics.

slot_1.label: Cleaning Operations
slot_1.caption: Quality operations used before downstream analysis

slot_2.label: Transformation Evidence
slot_2.caption: Prepared data supports accurate category and trend metrics

chapters.title: Visualization Deliverables in Zeppelin
chapters.line_1: Zeppelin converts processed outputs into visual evidence for rapid interpretation.
chapters.line_2: Interactive charts support technical validation and business communication.
chapters.connect: Connection: Not just answers, understandable answers.

slot_1.label: Visualization Palette
slot_1.caption: Core chart family used in notebook reporting

slot_2.label: Zeppelin Snapshot
slot_2.caption: Notebook output prepared for discussion and presentation

chapters.title: Requirement 1: Business Analysis
chapters.line_1: Business analysis maps market concentration, category structure, and quality distribution.
chapters.line_2: Ranking, trend, and variance logic distinguish popularity from consistency.
chapters.connect: Connection: High volume does not always mean high satisfaction.

slot_1.label: Business Analysis Scope
slot_1.caption: Requirement coverage for business-focused metrics

slot_2.label: Category & Quality Evidence
slot_2.caption: Category frequency and rating behavior context

chapters.title: Requirement 1: User Analysis
chapters.line_1: User analysis tracks growth, influence, and participation quality over time.
chapters.line_2: Elite dynamics and reviewer concentration reveal how credibility shapes engagement.
chapters.connect: Connection: Influence is not only activity; it is impact.

slot_1.label: User Growth Dynamics
slot_1.caption: Year-over-year participation trends

slot_2.label: Reviewer Influence
slot_2.caption: Contribution concentration among top users

chapters.title: Requirement 1: Review Analysis
chapters.line_1: Review mining turns unstructured language into operationally useful signals.
chapters.line_2: Keyword frequency and low-star bigrams expose recurring customer pain points.
chapters.connect: Connection: Language turns ratings into reasons.

slot_1.label: Review Language Signals
slot_1.caption: Text patterns beyond star averages

slot_2.label: Sentiment Distribution
slot_2.caption: Positive and negative lexical behavior

chapters.title: Requirement 1: Rating Analysis
chapters.line_1: Rating analysis captures score distributions, timing effects, and location-level differentials.
chapters.line_2: Temporal and comparative views reveal stability, bias, and satisfaction dynamics.
chapters.connect: Connection: Ratings summarize outcomes, but timing explains dynamics.

slot_1.label: Rating Distribution View
slot_1.caption: Frequency structure and top-scoring clusters

slot_2.label: Category Rating Context
slot_2.caption: Rating behavior compared across categories

chapters.title: Requirement 1: Check-in & Comprehensive Analysis
chapters.line_1: Check-ins capture physical demand and complement digital review behavior.
chapters.line_2: Comprehensive metrics combine traffic, rating frequency, and quality into stronger ranking logic.
chapters.connect: Connection: Physical traffic complements digital feedback.

slot_1.label: Check-in Behavior
slot_1.caption: Footfall patterns over time and location

slot_2.label: Comprehensive Scope
slot_2.caption: How cross-domain metrics align in one analytical frame

chapters.title: Requirement 2: Data Enrichment & Exploration
chapters.line_1: Requirement 2 extends analysis beyond internal Yelp records.
chapters.line_2: External evidence is used to validate, refine, or challenge internal conclusions.
chapters.connect: Connection: Internal metrics gain meaning through real-world context.

slot_1.label: Enrichment Overview
slot_1.caption: Cross-validation logic across internal and external signals

chapters.title: External Data / Cross-Validation Sources
chapters.line_1: External sources add weather, demographic, trust, and market context.
chapters.line_2: Cross-source alignment improves confidence and reduces single-dataset bias.
chapters.connect: Connection: Better decisions come from combined evidence.

slot_1.caption: Source-to-hypothesis mapping for validation workflow

chapters.line_1: Selected hypotheses test mood shifts, location risk, and credibility anomalies.
chapters.line_2: Each hypothesis links SQL analysis with real-world evidence pathways.
chapters.connect: Connection: Data enrichment transforms activity into explanation.

slot_1.caption: Enrichment problem space for advanced investigation

chapters.title: From Analysis to Product
chapters.line_1: After validating the analytics pipeline, we productized it into an independent web application.
chapters.line_2: The result is a user-facing system on top of real distributed processing.
chapters.connect: Connection: From infrastructure to interaction.

slot_1.label: Productization Storyboard
slot_1.caption: Transition from ETL artifacts to product experience

slot_2.label: Delivery Context
slot_2.caption: Team execution from engineering to presentation outcome

chapters.title: Introducing Query by SilkByteX
chapters.line_1: Query by SilkByteX is the product culmination of the whole pipeline, not a toy chatbot.
chapters.line_2: Natural language questions become executable SQL and interpretable outputs.
chapters.connect: Connection: We built more than a dashboard, a data-driven dialogue.

slot_1.label: Product Layer Snapshot
slot_1.caption: Conversational interface connected to real data systems

slot_2.caption: Question to SQL to chart in one animated flow

chapters.title: System Architecture of Query by SilkByteX
chapters.line_1: Presentation handles chat interaction and result rendering.
chapters.line_2: Service and execution layers handle schema context, SQL logic, and safe backend processing.
chapters.connect: Connection: Layered architecture enables usability with rigor.

slot_1.label: Architecture Blueprint
slot_1.caption: Three-layer system architecture with role clarity

slot_2.label: Layer Diagram
slot_2.caption: Layer responsibilities across user, logic, and data execution

chapters.title: Text-to-SQL Core Workflow
chapters.line_1: The workflow follows the official order from intent capture to validated execution.
chapters.line_2: Error feedback loops trigger correction before responses are returned.
chapters.connect: Connection: Natural language in, structured query out.

slot_1.label: Workflow Diagram
slot_1.caption: Core orchestration path used by the application

chapters.title: UI/UX & Data Presentation Features
chapters.line_1: The interface is designed for both computation and comprehension.
chapters.line_2: Users can inspect SQL, validate data tables, and read charted trends in one flow.
chapters.connect: Connection: Not just answers, understandable answers.

chapters.title: Demo / Example Queries
chapters.line_1: Example: Show me the top 5 highest-rated Mexican restaurants in Philadelphia that have over 500 reviews.
chapters.line_2: Example: Which 10 cities have the most elite users? Every step remains SQL-traceable.

chapters.title: Project Highlights / Achievements
chapters.line_1: Delivered an end-to-end system from distributed ingestion to conversational querying.
chapters.line_2: Technical complexity was translated into decision-ready and explainable output.
chapters.connect: Connection: Not just a dashboard, not just a chatbot, an integrated analytics experience.

chapters.title: Team Workflow & Leadership
chapters.line_1: Structured repository practices enabled parallel contribution with stable integration.
chapters.line_2: Coordination discipline kept engineering, analytics, and delivery synchronized.
chapters.connect: Connection: Strong workflow governance supports stable execution.

slot_1.label: Execution Cadence
slot_1.caption: Operational rhythm across planning, build, and integration

chapters.title: Lessons Learned
chapters.line_1: The project strengthened systems thinking across infrastructure, SQL, and user-facing delivery.
chapters.line_2: It proved that robust architecture and clear UX can coexist in one product.
chapters.connect: Connection: We transformed complexity into clarity.

slot_1.label: Architecture Reflection
slot_1.caption: Systems-level learning captured across all layers

slot_2.label: Journey Synthesis
slot_2.caption: End-to-end summary for final presentation close

closing.title: From Raw Data to Conversational Intelligence
closing.line_1: Raw data -> structured warehouse -> scalable analytics -> visualization -> conversational intelligence.
closing.line_2: SilkByte X Query turns infrastructure depth into accessible decision support.
closing.line_3: This is an end-to-end big data analytics product, not a standalone chatbot.
closing.connect: Final Connection: From coursework to production-style, explainable analytics interaction.

finale_slot.label: Finale Visual: End-to-End Value Chain
